name: Battlefield Finds Table
source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules
description: Loot found when searching battlefields after combat

1.narrative: The battlefield has been thoroughly picked over by scavengers

2.narrative: You recover some basic components and scrap metal

3.description: Found usable equipment - roll on gear table
3.narrative: Intact equipment scattered among the debris

4.description: Found weapon - roll on military weapons table
4.narrative: A functional weapon lies among the fallen

5.narrative: Rare components and intact systems recovered

6.narrative: An exceptional find among the wreckage

scanner_bonus.description: Having a scanner adds +1 to the roll
